word: H763 - אֲרַם נַהֲרַיִם - ʼĂram Nahărayim - ar-am' nah-har-ah'-yim - Aham-naharaim

sections.paragraph:
Original: ארם נהרים

Transliteration: 'ăram nahărayim

Phonetic: ar-am' nah-har-ah'-yim

BDB Definition:

Aram-naharaim = "Aram of the two rivers"
  1. Mesopotamia

Origin: from H758 and the dual of H5104

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
